headline: The App Store for Sovereign AI.
subheadline: HeadyStore is the marketplace where the Heady community builds, discovers, and distributes the skills, agents, templates, and tools that make every Heady deployment more powerful. One-click install. Real revenue share. Community-curated quality.
body: Developers publish agent skill packages, workflow templates, MCP server connections, UI components, and industry-specific starter kits. Businesses discover pre-built solutions for their use case. Everyone earns. The Heady ecosystem grows. Join the waitlist to publish or get early access when HeadyStore launches.

badge.text: Planned · Join the waitlist for early publisher access
